body: ## [1.10.5](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.10.4...v1.10.5) (2017-02-06) ### Bug Fixes * **urlSync:** update url only after threshold (#1917) ([b0f0cf1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/b0f0cf1)), closes [#1856](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1856)
